subcodes.first_line: O Mihdi! Upon thee be My glory and My loving-kindness! From the Pen in the Most Great Prison there hath flowed, in remembrance of thee, that which hath taken flight [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا مهدی علیک بهائی و عنایتی قد جری فی ذکرک من القلم فی السجن الاعظم ما طارت
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
